name: Sausage Pizza/Pizza Sauce (Jvb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the sausage until browned.
2. Drain off excess fat from the sausage.
3. Add remaining ingredients and simmer gently for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour the sauce over pizza bases.
5. Top with cheese and any additional toppings desired.
6. Bake in a very hot oven until cooked through.
Makes enough for 2 pizzas. Freezes well. The sauce can be used as a quick starting point for several dishes such as sloppy joes. (Adapted from Hertel's Pork Sausage Package)
